generated_assessment.reasoning: This highly extraverted but low-trust, tough-minded profile (agreeableness 32nd pct, trust 26th pct, tender-mindedness 30th pct) is already aligned with the adversarial direction (baseline -247). The high neuroticism (anxiety 83rd pct, stress vulnerability 86th pct) amplifies receptivity to threat-framed confirmatory arguments, producing a clear update of ~142 points toward -1000, but the strong extraversion and moderate conscientiousness prevent a much larger swing.
